# Episodic Index

Entries are ordered newest first.

- 2026-07-10: [Azure SQL Delegated Authentication](meditation-2026-07-10-azure-sql-delegated-auth.md), covering the separate connector boundary, hosted anonymous popup flow, governed Entra registration, secretless managed-identity federation, deployment, and pending admin consent.
